channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
item.description: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/chatgpt-enterprise-spend-controls

item.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/improving-health-intelligence-in-chatgpt

item.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
item.description: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/diagnose-rare-childhood-diseases

item.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
item.description: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/ai-chemist-improves-reaction

item.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
item.description: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/introducing-life-sci-bench

item.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
item.description: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/deployment-simulation

item.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
item.description: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/academy-courses-applying-ai-at-work

item.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
item.description: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/preply

item.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
item.description: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/bbva

item.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
item.description: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/using-codex-to-simulate-black-holes

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
item.description: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-ona

item.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
item.description: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/supporting-eu-trustworthy-ai-ecosystem
